systems.name: Vexas
systems.description: A mined-out husk, a century past its prime.

orbitals.name: Rainbow
orbitals.description: A once-vibrant gas giant, now strip-mined to a brown ball of exhaust.

landing_options.name: Abandoned Mining Platform
landing_options.description: Solar-powered maintenance drones keep it minimally operational, but it could sink into the clouds any day now.

destinations.name: Rig Manager's Office
destinations.description: Strangely clean, given how long it's been abandoned. There's no life here to generate dust, you guess. There is however some truly sophisticated art on the wall.

objects.name: Art on the wall
objects.description: It's an old-fashioned paper pinup of a scantily-clad Antarran "Actress." Under a blue lipstick print is a signature and the inscription: "From one hometown spawn to another -- stay inscrutable, <3 Andira Manara."

orbitals.name: Blemish
orbitals.description: The ugliest moon in the galaxy, home to a tapped-out irridium mine and not much else.

landing_options.name: Mining Colony 5
landing_options.description: Home sweet home. Sometimes you wonder what happened to colonies one through four. If life here is any indication, they must have died of boredom.

destinations.name: Pointless Settlement
destinations.description: It keeps us all alive, for some reason.

destinations.name: Your place
destinations.description: Just enough room to sleep, with a fold-out desk and chair for reading and a collapsible combination toilet and shower.

destinations.name: Airlock
destinations.description: Connects the dreary dome to the even drearier lunar surface.
